name: planwise
description: Planwise - CRM SaaS orienté opérations terrain (monorepo TypeScript).

scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace @planwise/shared --if-present && npm run build --workspace @planwise/telemetry --if-present
scripts.backend: docker compose up -d --wait && npm run backend:run
scripts.monitoring:local: docker compose --profile monitoring up -d --wait && node scripts/monitoring-local-verify.mjs
scripts.backend:microservices: npm run build:shared && TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=true concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n org,users,permissions,fleet,technicians,dossiers,stock,customers,subscriptions,notifications,documents,exports "npm run start:dev -w @planwise/organizations-service" "sleep 1.5 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/users-service" "sleep 3 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/permissions-service" "sleep 4.5 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/fleet-service" "sleep 6 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/technicians-service" "sleep 7.5 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/cases-service" "sleep 9 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/stock-service" "sleep 10.5 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/customers-service" "sleep 12 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/subscriptions-service" "sleep 13.5 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/notifications-service" "sleep 15 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/documents-service" "sleep 16.5 && npm run start:dev -w @planwise/exports-service"
scripts.backend:run: npm run build:shared && wait-on -t 60000 tcp:localhost:27017 && node scripts/free-backend-ports.mjs && node scripts/backend-run.mjs
